subject: Copy logging config to docker-staging
commit_message:
Copy logging config to docker-staging

Issue-Id: CCSDK-71
Change-Id: I1824228951dd38938216ee4bb242c516ed870e55
Signed-off-by: Marcus G K Williams <marcus.williams@intel.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-distribution-master-verify-java/31/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/ccsdk-distribution-master-verify-java/31

Patch Set 1:

This should fix failing build of odlsli container - the org.ops4j.pax.logging.cfg need to be copied to docker-stage before it can be copied into the docker container on build.
Change has been successfully merged by Dan Timoney
